Kadir Has University Clubs Association – WinterFest 2024

On December 13, 2024, Kadir Has University Clubs Association organized the WinterFest event with the support of all student clubs at the university.

During the day-long event in Amphitheater Garden C, students had the opportunity to come together and socialize through club stands. Later in the day, various surprise gifts were given to the participants with a raffle draw.

The festival continued with an energetic DJ performance. WinterFest, organized after the midterm semester, provided students with pleasant and fun moments.
